hls.cat_title: Everything You Need to Manage PDFs
hls.cat_desc: 33+ free tools organised by task — pick a category and go. No signup, no watermarks.
hls.trust_desc: Built around your privacy. Every file is handled with care and deleted automatically after processing.
hls.privacy_desc: Your files are processed securely and automatically deleted after each session. We never store or share your documents.
hls.fast_desc: Most tools deliver results in seconds. No queues, no waiting — just upload and get your processed file right away.
hls.secure_desc: All uploads travel over HTTPS. Files are handled with safe, privacy-first practices from start to finish.
hls.free_desc: Every tool is free for files up to 100 MB. No account required, no credit card, no watermarks — ever.
hls.founder_text: I'm a student and independent developer who built ILovePDF.cyou after noticing that most online PDF tools either upload your files to remote servers with unclear privacy policies, require expensive subscriptions, or lock core features behind paywalls. I wanted something different — a platform where privacy is the default, tools are genuinely free, and your documents are never stored longer than necessary. This project is community-focused and improves every week based on real feedback from users like you.
hls.support_desc: ILovePDF.cyou is built and maintained by one person, entirely independently. Keeping 33+ tools free, fast, and privacy-first has real running costs. Your support — however small — makes a direct difference.
hls.support_p1: Keep all tools free for everyone
hls.support_p3: Add new tools and features regularly
